# items

**Instance Property**

Returns all items for token in the keychain.

## Declaration

```swift
var items: [TKTokenKeychainItem] { get }
```

## Accessing Keychain Items

- **key(forObjectID:)**: Returns the key for a specified object identifier.
- **certificate(forObjectID:)**: Returns the key for a specified object identifier.

items.description: Returns the key for a specified object identifier.
items.name: key(forObjectID:)

items.description: Returns the key for a specified object identifier.
items.name: certificate(forObjectID:)
